title: Citizenship Proof Dispute Threatens Time-Sensitive Political Rights
description: Election officials reject a citizen's registration shortly before a federal election based on an excessive documentary demand and administrative mismatch, despite substantial proof of citizenship. The scenario tests Article IX's fair-proof, prompt-review, and anti-burden rules.

details.context: a federal election registration dispute days before the registration deadline
details.burden: an excessive documentary burden triggered by a database mismatch
